message:
test(mvcc): bd-2sm1 snapshot isolation + version chain proptests + compliance gate

Add MVCC property-based tests for snapshot isolation (INV-PBT-4):
- prop_snapshot_isolation_multi_writer: multi-writer workload generates
  random commits to random pages, then verifies snapshots at various
  high values only see versions <= high and resolve the maximal visible.
- prop_version_chain_strictly_descending: verifies walk_chain returns
  versions in strictly descending commit_seq order.

Add bd-2sm1 compliance gate harness tests (3 tests passing).

All four proptest pillars now covered: B-tree (cursor.rs), parser
(parser.rs), record format (record.rs), MVCC (invariants.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
